title: Orange Eyed Totem
description: A reimagined totem pack that replaces the Totem of Undying’s eyes with glowing orange, giving it a warm yet powerful look while fitting naturally into Minecraft’s classic style.
body: A reimagined totem pack that replaces the Totem of Undying’s eyes with glowing orange, giving it a warm yet powerful look that feels magical and energetic while blending seamlessly with Minecraft’s classic visual style and atmosphere.
